title: Office Cleaner
description:
Work Location: Pasir Panjang
Working Days: Mon-Fri 8:30am - 5:30pm, Sat 7am - 11am

Job Scope:

  • Responsible in maintaining cleanliness of the area assigned by Cleaning Supervisor / Facilities Manager
  • Good team player
  • To minimise complaints from Client on cleaning issue
  • Ensure feedback receive from user and convey accordingly to Cleaner Supervisor for any action to be taken
  • Ensure toilet amenities are replenished daily
  • Ensure pantry items are in order
  • To be punctual and work according to time slot assigned
  • Able to speak and understand simple English
  • Ensure daily cleaning operation without fail
  • To report daily activities to Cleaning Supervisor and attend monthly meetings/ conduct inspections as and when require
  • Provides excellent level of customer service to both internal and external customers
  • Other duties as reasonably requested from time to time.
  • Provide early ordering of depleting cleaning materials to Cleaning Supervisor
  • Valuable items found to be returned back to owner or Housekeeping for action
  • Neat and good overall appearance
  • To be professional in communicating with clients
  • Maintain a good relationship with the client management and colleagues.
  • Responsible for the adherence to all Occupational Health and safety conditions
  • Understand and be proactive in the adherence to all Sodexo policy and procedure guidelines

postedCompany.description:
Sodexo in Singapore

 

Sodexo Singapore was established in 1982 and presently provides On-site Service Solutions to reputable and prestigious organisations.


We have a strong presence in Corporate, Education, Defence, Seniors, Remote Sites and Offshore client segments and are well positioned to support the various businesses in the evaluation of the best possible methods of providing safe, productive and economically feasible food and facilities management service solutions to our clients.


With the support of our international network, as well as our strong presence and experience in the Asia Pacific region, Sodexo Singapore is a leading provider of On-site Service Solutions in Singapore.

 

Industy: Facilities Management Service/ Food Service/ Remote Sites (Offshore)

 

History

Sodexo designs, manages and delivers a full range of Comprehensive service solutions so that you can focus fully on what you do best.

 

Sodexo Singapore has more than 20 years of experience in Corporate, Education, Defence, Seniors and Remote Site client segments, see how we can support you today!
postedCompany.name: SODEXO SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
